_comment: Microsoft Fabric MCP server — VS Code format. Auth is sourced via VS Code 'inputs' (prompted at first use, stored in the secret vault) AND/OR environment variables. NEVER paste tokens here. Obtain a token with: az account get-access-token --resource https://api.fabric.microsoft.com. See labs/lab12.md.

inputs.description: Microsoft Fabric API token (run: az account get-access-token --resource https://api.fabric.microsoft.com --query accessToken -o tsv)

fabric.description: Microsoft Fabric MCP — enumerate lakehouses, run notebook cells, query OneLake from VS Code. Auth via prompted inputs (stored in VS Code secret vault) or FABRIC_AUTH_TOKEN env var.
